blended.narrative: Cascade Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 1,798 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F, winds around 22 mph. Expect powder.
